subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1914-12-05
subcodes.first_line: When I reached Los Angeles, I realized how far I was from Acca and my people, the people whom I loved with passionate earnestness. On the second night of my arrival
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @Shrines and Holy places, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
